messages.content: yup, understood the assignment 😎 anything else i can do for ya?
So what can u do
bruh i can do everything 😭 media downloads, ai images, group management, stickers, games — type `.menu` to see the full list
U can create image
yup, totally! just hit me with `.imagine` or `.flux` and tell me what you wanna see 🎨
Ok
cool, so what kinda image you thinking of? or just saying "ok" to my capabilities? 😂
A war machine in a battle

gotcha. so you want me to generate "a war machine in a battle"?

use `.imagine a war machine in a battle` or `.flux a war machine in a battle` to make it happen 🤖
Ok nice
😅 My brain's taking a quick nap rn. Try again in a sec!
yup, you're chatting with azahra 😼 the one and only.
Shutup
make me 🤣
How
nah, my replies are just too fire you get speechless 💅
Goodbye
peace out then ✌️ don't miss me too much lol
Speak Japanese
日本語？ お安い御用だよ 😼 何か用？
No japanese in english
ah, my bad 😅 switching back to english now. what's up?
I love you
damn that was smooth 😏 but im a bot bro chill lmao
Arigato
np fam 🔥

No
I just know a few shii
a few shii is better than no shii at all ngl 😂

Goodnight baby
See you when I need more sticker
😅 My brain's taking a quick nap rn. Try again in a sec!
